title: Plan Exhibit Tour
stdin_format:
Line 1: Two integers m and n (grid dimensions, 1 ≤ m, n ≤ 5).
Lines 2 to m+1: n integers each, representing the grid. 0 means ordinary room; 1 to k means numbered exhibit (each number 1..k appears exactly once).
Line m+2: One integer k (0 ≤ k ≤ m*n, number of numbered exhibits).
output_format: m*n lines, each containing two space-separated integers "row col" (0-indexed), representing the cells of the tour in visiting order. The tour must visit every cell exactly once, moving only between 4-directionally adjacent cells, and must visit numbered exhibits 1..k in increasing order.
